TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: izua ti Muakai kati Muatjuku, a mare sikatseke…´.
S.PHON: izua ti muakai kati muacuku, a mar…ô sika ¶…ôk…ô é.
S.FORM: izua ti Muakai kati Muatjuku, a mare sikacekelj.
S.PHON: izua ti muakai kati mua ¶uku, a mar…ô sika ¶…ôk…ô é.
S.TRANSL: There were two cousins, Muakai and Muatjuku.

S.FORM: putseke…´ ti Maku…´u…´u tjai Muakai; pua…´ak tjai Sapulungan.
S.PHON: pu ¶…ôk…ô é ti maku éu éu cai muakai; pua éak cai sapu…≠u≈ãan.
S.FORM: pucekelj ti Makuljulju tjai Muakai; pualjak tjai Sapulungan.
S.PHON: pu ¶…ôk…ô é ti maku éu éu ¶ai muakai; pua éak ¶ai sapu…≠u≈ãan.
S.TRANSL: Maku…´u…´u married Muakai, and their child was Sapulungan.

S.FORM: putseke…´ ti Sapulungan tjai Muatjuku; pua…´ak tjai Muakai.
S.PHON: pu ¶…ôk…ô é ti sapu…≠u≈ãan cai muacuku; pua éak cai muakai.
S.FORM: pucekelj ti Sapulungan tjai Muatjuku; pualjak tjai Muakai.
S.PHON: pu ¶…ôk…ô é ti sapu…≠u≈ãan ¶ai mua ¶uku; pua éak ¶ai muakai.
S.TRANSL: (Another) Sapulungan married Muatjuku, and their child was Muakai.

S.FORM: …´akua a kutji sakamaya, neka nu kinatsavatsavan; …´akua matsaqu a qivu.
S.PHON: éakua a kuci sakamaja, n…ôka nu kina ¶ava ¶avan; éakua ma ¶aqu a qivu.
S.FORM: ljakua a kutji sakamaya, neka nu kinacavacavan; ljakua macaqu a qivu.
S.PHON: éakua a ku ¶i sakamaja, n…ôka nu kina ¶ava ¶avan; éakua ma ¶aqu a qivu.
S.TRANSL: But she was only a vagina, she had no body; but she could speak.

S.PHON: "uzi pua éak ti muacuku tua vavajan.
"uzi pua éak ti mua ¶uku tua vavajan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWell, Muatjuku has had a girl.

S.FORM: ari tja …´i…´avaw; u…´a kisudju ti Sapulungan."
S.PHON: ari ca éi éavaw; u éa kisu…âu ti sapu…≠u≈ãan."
S.FORM: ari tja ljiljavaw; ulja kisudju ti Sapulungan."
S.PHON: ari ¶a éi éavaw; u éa kisu…âu ti sapu…≠u≈ãan."
S.TRANSL: Let‚Äôs go and visit them, so that Sapulungan can court her.‚Äù

S.PHON: vaik a é…ômi éaw.
vaik a é…ômi éaw.
S.TRANSL: They went to pay a visit.

S.PHON: "ainu a nu a éak" aja ma≈ãc…ôz.
"ainu a nu a éak" aja ma≈ã ¶…ôz.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhere is your child?‚Äù they said when they arrived.

S.PHON: qi éain.
qi éain.
S.TRANSL: She was hidden.

S.PHON: "n…ôka.
"n…ôka.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúThere‚Äôs none.

S.PHON: inika ¶au ¶au a nia a éak."
inika ¶au ¶au a nia a éak."
S.TRANSL: Our child didn‚Äôt live.‚Äù

S.PHON: vaik a ¶…ômik…ô…≠ a na é…ômi éaw.
vaik a ¶…ômik…ô…≠ a na é…ômi éaw.
S.TRANSL: The visitors went back.

S.PHON: é…ômtu a≈ãa ti sapu…≠u≈ãan.
é…ômtu a≈ãa ti sapu…≠u≈ãan.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan grew up.

S.FORM: vaik a qema…´up tua uri sikisudju.
S.PHON: vaik a q…ôma éup tua uri sikisu…âu.
S.FORM: vaik a qemaljup tua uri sikisudju.
S.PHON: vaik a q…ôma éup tua uri sikisu…âu.
S.TRANSL: He went to hunt something as a courting present.

S.PHON: "uri ma≈ãc…ôz am…ôn a pauk…ôz."
"uri ma≈ã ¶…ôz am…ôn a pauk…ôz."
S.TRANSL: (His parents sent a message:) ‚ÄúWe are coming to arrange a marriage.‚Äù

S.FORM: saka, "mangtjez; uri tja kudain sa tja a…´ak a namaitutsu?
S.PHON: saka, "ma≈ãc…ôz; uri ca kudain sa ca a éak a namaitu ¶u
S.FORM: saka, "mangtjez; uri tja kudain sa tja aljak a namaitucu?
S.PHON: saka, "ma≈ã ¶…ôz; uri ¶a kudain sa ¶a a éak a namaitu ¶u
S.TRANSL: So (her parents said:) ‚ÄúThey are coming. What are we going to do about our child like this?

S.PHON: ca sisiaq a≈ãa.
¶a sisiaq a≈ãa.
S.TRANSL: We‚Äôre ashamed of her.

S.PHON: pai ca qi éa-u."
pai ¶a qi éa-u."
S.TRANSL: Let‚Äôs hide her.‚Äù

S.PHON: sia…≠ap tua éa≈ãian, sa pasazuain.
sia…≠ap tua éa≈ãian, sa pasazuain.
S.TRANSL: They got a trunk and put her in that.

S.FORM: satjezen a pasa tsemtsemel itua …´iv, sa vayvayin a itung anga.
S.PHON: sac…ôz…ôn a pasa ¶…ôm ¶…ôm…ô…≠ itua éiv, sa vajvajin a itu≈ã a≈ãa.
S.FORM: satjezen a pasa cemcemel itua ljiv, sa vayvayin a itung anga.
S.PHON: sa ¶…ôz…ôn a pasa ¶…ôm ¶…ôm…ô…≠ itua éiv, sa vajvajin a itu≈ã a≈ãa.
S.TRANSL: They sent it off to a cave in the woods, and hung clothes round it.

S.PHON: …âumak…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan a kinazuan.
…âumak…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan a kinazuan.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan found the place.

S.FORM: "aku namaitutsu a imaza, a liaw a itung anga, qau neka nu tsautsau?"
S.PHON: "aku namaitu ¶u a imaza, a …≠iaw a itu≈ã a≈ãa, qau n…ôka nu ¶au ¶au"
S.FORM: "aku namaitucu a imaza, a liaw a itung anga, qau neka nu caucau?"
S.PHON: "aku namaitu ¶u a imaza, a …≠iaw a itu≈ã a≈ãa, qau n…ôka nu ¶au ¶au"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy is it like this, with lots of clothes and nobody here?‚Äù

S.FORM: patsunan nimadju a sema taladj tua …´iv.
S.PHON: pa ¶unan nima…âu a s…ôma ta…≠a…â tua éiv.
S.FORM: pacunan nimadju a sema taladj tua ljiv.
S.PHON: pa ¶unan nima…âu a s…ôma ta…≠a…â tua éiv.
S.TRANSL: He looked inside the cave;

S.PHON: manu izua éa≈ãian.
manu izua éa≈ãian.
S.TRANSL: and there was the chest.

S.PHON: su ¶aq…ôvin ni sapu…≠u≈ãan.
su ¶aq…ôvin ni sapu…≠u≈ãan.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan opened the lid.

S.FORM: manu izua i taladj a tsinavu.
S.PHON: manu izua i ta…≠a…â a ¶inavu.
S.FORM: manu izua i taladj a cinavu.
S.PHON: manu izua i ta…≠a…â a ¶inavu.
S.TRANSL: Inside there was something wrapped up.

S.PHON: "maja k…ôn a s…ômu ¶avu, masiaq ak…ôn."
"maja k…ôn a s…ômu ¶avu, masiaq ak…ôn."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt unwrap me. I‚Äôm ashamed.‚Äù

S.PHON: "tima sun"
"tima sun"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWho are you?‚Äù

S.PHON: "tiak…ôn a a éak ak…ôn ni muacuku."
"tiak…ôn a a éak ak…ôn ni mua ¶uku."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI‚Äôm Muatjuku‚Äôs child.‚Äù

S.PHON: "aku sun a imaza"
"aku sun a imaza"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhy are you here?‚Äù

S.PHON: "qini éa≈ãa k…ôn ni nia kina.
"qini éa≈ãa k…ôn ni nia kina.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI was hidden by mother.

S.PHON: 'masiaq tua qa…≠iqa…≠i,' aja tia kina."
îmasiaq tua qa…≠iqa…≠i, î aja tia kina."
S.TRANSL: Mother and the others said: ‚ÄòWe‚Äôre ashamed of what others will say.‚Äô‚Äù

S.PHON: a…≠ap…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan, sa sikau-in.
a…≠ap…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan, sa sikau-in.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan took her and put her in his net-bag (rucksack).

S.FORM: "anema, qalian, sa su kinavits a sadjelung?"
S.PHON: "an…ôma, qa…≠ian, sa su kinavi ¶ a sa…â…ô…≠u≈ã"
S.FORM: "anema, qalian, sa su kinavic a sadjelung?"
S.PHON: "an…ôma, qa…≠ian, sa su kinavi ¶ a sa…â…ô…≠u≈ã"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúFriend, what‚Äôs that heavy thing on your back?‚Äù

S.PHON: " éakaraw."
" éakaraw."
S.TRANSL: ‚Äú…´akaraw flowers (for head decorations).‚Äù

S.FORM: vaik timadju a isangas qemalats, sa vaik a sema tjumaq.
S.PHON: vaik tima…âu a isa≈ãas q…ôma…≠a ¶, sa vaik a s…ôma cumaq.
S.FORM: vaik timadju a isangas qemalac, sa vaik a sema tjumaq.
S.PHON: vaik tima…âu a isa≈ãas q…ôma…≠a ¶, sa vaik a s…ôma ¶umaq.
S.TRANSL: He went ahead with a hunter‚Äôs shout of success, and went home.

S.FORM: semukavits, sa alapen a pasa surur, saka taqed.
S.PHON: s…ômukavi ¶, sa a…≠ap…ôn a pasa surur, saka taq…ôd.
S.FORM: semukavic, sa alapen a pasa surur, saka taqed.
S.PHON: s…ômukavi ¶, sa a…≠ap…ôn a pasa surur, saka taq…ôd.
S.TRANSL: He took off his load, took it to the bed platform and went to sleep.

S.FORM: "tekelu tua vava, kanu tua kinsa," nu aya a kina, "saqetju aken," aya sakamaya timadju.
S.PHON: "t…ôk…ô…≠u tua vava, kanu tua kinsa," nu aja a kina, "saq…ôcu ak…ôn," aja sakamaja tima…âu.
S.FORM: "tekelu tua vava, kanu tua kinsa," nu aya a kina, "saqetju aken," aya sakamaya timadju.
S.PHON: "t…ôk…ô…≠u tua vava, kanu tua kinsa," nu aja a kina, "saq…ô ¶u ak…ôn," aja sakamaja tima…âu.
S.TRANSL: When his mother said: ‚ÄúDrink some beer, have some food,‚Äù he just said: ‚ÄúI‚Äôm ill‚Äù.

S.FORM: tapuluq katu lima inika keman tua kinsa.
S.PHON: tapu…≠uq katu …≠ima inika k…ôman tua kinsa.
S.FORM: tapuluq katu lima inika keman tua kinsa.
S.PHON: tapu…≠uq katu …≠ima inika k…ôman tua kinsa.
S.TRANSL: He didn‚Äôt eat for 15 days.

S.FORM: "Sapulungan, uzai a vavuy," aya qaliqali, "sa-u alapu."
S.PHON: "sapu…≠u≈ãan, uzai a vavuj," aja qa…≠iqa…≠i, "sa-u a…≠apu."
S.FORM: "Sapulungan, uzai a vavuy," aya qaliqali, "sa-u alapu."
S.PHON: "sapu…≠u≈ãan, uzai a vavuj," aja qa…≠iqa…≠i, "sa-u a…≠apu."
S.TRANSL: Some people said: ‚ÄúSapulungan, there are some wild pigs; go and get them.‚Äù

S.PHON: vaik ti sapu…≠u≈ãan a q…ôma éup.
vaik ti sapu…≠u≈ãan a q…ôma éup.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan went hunting.

S.FORM: parimasudj a kina tua qaqerengan nimadju; manu izua nuki anema.
S.PHON: parimasu…â a kina tua qaq…ôr…ô≈ãan nima…âu; manu izua nuki an…ôma.
S.FORM: parimasudj a kina tua qaqerengan nimadju; manu izua nuki anema.
S.PHON: parimasu…â a kina tua qaq…ôr…ô≈ãan nima…âu; manu izua nuki an…ôma.
S.TRANSL: His mother tidied his bed; and there was something there.

S.FORM: "manu mavan a saqetjuan nua ku a…´ak," aya, sa veritsan a pasa tekutekuan.
S.PHON: "manu mavan a saq…ôcuan nua ku a éak," aja, sa v…ôri ¶an a pasa t…ôkut…ôkuan.
S.FORM: "manu mavan a saqetjuan nua ku aljak," aya, sa verican a pasa tekutekuan.
S.PHON: "manu mavan a saq…ô ¶uan nua ku a éak," aja, sa v…ôri ¶an a pasa t…ôkut…ôkuan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúSo that was my son‚Äôs illness,‚Äù she said, and threw it down below (to the rubbish heap).

S.FORM: mangtjez ti Sapulungan; "ainu a ku..?" aya.
S.PHON: ma≈ãc…ôz ti sapu…≠u≈ãan; "ainu a ku.. î" aja.
S.FORM: mangtjez ti Sapulungan; "ainu a ku..'" aya.
S.PHON: ma≈ã ¶…ôz ti sapu…≠u≈ãan; "ainu a ku.. î" aja.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan came back. ‚ÄúWhere is my..?‚Äù he said.

S.PHON: "an…ôma su siajaja
"an…ôma su siajaja
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhat do you mean?

S.PHON: su pa…≠i≈ã…ôd
su pa…≠i≈ã…ôd
S.TRANSL: Your flute?

S.PHON: su éa é…ôg…ôan"
su éa é…ôg…ôan"
S.TRANSL: Your mouth-organ?‚Äù

S.PHON: "inika mavan a ku siaja."
"inika mavan a ku siaja."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúThat‚Äôs not what I mean.‚Äù

S.FORM: "mavan ka su maya a ku siniverits."
S.PHON: "mavan ka su maja a ku siniv…ôri ¶."
S.FORM: "mavan ka su maya a ku siniveric."
S.PHON: "mavan ka su maja a ku siniv…ôri ¶."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúPerhaps you mean what I threw away.‚Äù

S.PHON: "su siv…ôri ¶ a pasa inu, kina"
"su siv…ôri ¶ a pasa inu, kina"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhere did you throw it, mother?‚Äù

S.PHON: "ku siv…ôri ¶ a pasa t…ôkut…ôkuan."
"ku siv…ôri ¶ a pasa t…ôkut…ôkuan."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI threw it down below.‚Äù

S.FORM: qau vaik ti Sapulungan sema zua.
S.PHON: qau vaik ti sapu…≠u≈ãan s…ôma zua.
S.FORM: qau vaik ti Sapulungan sema zua.
S.PHON: qau vaik ti sapu…≠u≈ãan s…ôma zua.
S.TRANSL: So Sapulungan went down there.

S.FORM: manu izua ti Muakai, a naqemiladj i tekutekuan.
S.PHON: manu izua ti muakai, a naq…ômi…≠a…â i t…ôkut…ôkuan.
S.FORM: manu izua ti Muakai, a naqemiladj i tekutekuan.
S.PHON: manu izua ti muakai, a naq…ômi…≠a…â i t…ôkut…ôkuan.
S.TRANSL: And there was Muakai, sitting there down below (having turned into a human being (OA)).

S.FORM: alapen ni Sapulungan a temaviki…´, a pasa ka…´uvu…´uvung.
S.PHON: a…≠ap…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan a t…ômaviki é, a pasa ka éuvu éuvu≈ã.
S.FORM: alapen ni Sapulungan a temavikilj, a pasa kaljuvuljuvung.
S.PHON: a…≠ap…ôn ni sapu…≠u≈ãan a t…ômaviki é, a pasa ka éuvu éuvu≈ã.
S.TRANSL: Sapulungan took her and embraced her, and took her to the resting platform.

S.PHON: "ku sa≈ãucaw," aja a kina.
"ku sa≈ãu ¶aw," aja a kina.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúI‚Äôll give her a kiss,‚Äù said his mother.

S.PHON: manu …≠…ômuni.
manu …≠…ômuni.
S.TRANSL: Then there was an earthquake.

S.FORM: malap a kina tua qata, sa pavayan tjai Muakai, sana kisangutj, sana pavay tua anemanemanga siniputseke…´ tjaimadju, sa pavayan tua matja…´a…´ak ni Muakai.
S.PHON: ma…≠ap a kina tua qata, sa pavajan cai muakai, sana kisa≈ãuc, sana pavaj tua an…ôman…ôma≈ãa sinipu ¶…ôk…ô é caima…âu, sa pavajan tua maca éa éak ni muakai.
S.FORM: malap a kina tua qata, sa pavayan tjai Muakai, sana kisangutj, sana pavay tua anemanemanga sinipucekelj tjaimadju, sa pavayan tua matjaljaljak ni Muakai.
S.PHON: ma…≠ap a kina tua qata, sa pavajan ¶ai muakai, sana kisa≈ãu ¶, sana pavaj tua an…ôman…ôma≈ãa sinipu ¶…ôk…ô é ¶aima…âu, sa pavajan tua ma ¶a éa éak ni muakai.
S.TRANSL: His mother took precious beads and gave them to Muakai, and kissed her, and gave all sorts of wedding gifts for her, and gave them to Muakai‚Äôs parents.

S.FORM: "ai, manu izainu anga a tja a…´ak?" aya tiamadju a ma·∏çusa, sana vaik a sema zua …´emi…´aw tjai Muakai.
S.PHON: "ai, manu izainu a≈ãa a ca a éak" aja tiama…âu a ma…ñusa, sana vaik a s…ôma zua é…ômi éaw cai muakai.
S.FORM: "ai, manu izainu anga a tja aljak?" aya tiamadju a madrusa, sana vaik a sema zua ljemiljaw tjai Muakai.
S.PHON: "ai, manu izainu a≈ãa a ¶a a éak" aja tiama…âu a ma…ñusa, sana vaik a s…ôma zua é…ômi éaw ¶ai muakai.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúOh, so where has our child got to?‚Äù they said, and went there to visit Muakai.

S.FORM: pua…´ak anga ti Muakai kati Sapulungan, saka malevanga tiamadju.
S.PHON: pua éak a≈ãa ti muakai kati sapu…≠u≈ãan, saka ma…≠…ôva≈ãa tiama…âu.
S.FORM: pualjak anga ti Muakai kati Sapulungan, saka malevanga tiamadju.
S.PHON: pua éak a≈ãa ti muakai kati sapu…≠u≈ãan, saka ma…≠…ôva≈ãa tiama…âu.
S.TRANSL: Muakai and Sapulungan had a child and were very happy.

S.PHON: amin a≈ãa.
amin a≈ãa.
S.TRANSL: The end.
